titleStmt.title: SII 6.574: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 574. (A.R. No. 138 of 1899). ON A SLAB NEAR THE RUINED TEMPLE OF SIVA CLOSE TO THE SAME POND.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
to 3 damaged
tavirōdhi nibhṛnmallanāhavamalla vijayakkenalla
nileyoḷ . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśva
ra paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḷōkyamalladē
vara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ tasaltumire
ta[tsūnu .] sa¨rvvalōkāśrayaṁ samastabudhajanāśrayanāhavamallanaṁkakāṟa paramaṁ
ḍaḷasūṟekāṟaṁ kaṭakaprākāraṁ vaṁdijanādhāra vairimadama¨rddana pratāpajanā¨rddana
nanacaḷitavākyaṁ cāḷukyamāṇikyaṁ vijayaśrīkāminījanakēḷinavamadanaṁ vipakṣa
kuḷakāḷada(ṁ)ṇḍa vīramā¨rtta(ṁ)ṇḍa ripurāyakāminīhṛdayasella sāhasamalla
dīnānāthacintāmaṇi maṇḍaḷikamakuṭacūḍāmaṇi vēṁgimaṁḍaḷēśva
ranayyanadaṇḍa śrī[viṣṇuva¨rddha]namahārāja vijayādityadēva
¨rnoḷaṁbavāḍimūvvattircāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadināḷdu
rājyaṁgeyyuttire . sandhivigrahi bāṇave¨rggaḍe daṁḍanā
yakaṁ manēkarājavibhūṣita kī
[¨rtti]dānanidhi bijjaladēvananūnadhā¨rmmikaṁ vettanutsaṁ
sakava¨rṣa 986 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada dakṣiṇāyana
saṁkrā(ṁ)ntiyalu traiḷōkyanakarēśvaradēva¨rgge ke
ḷeyiṁ mūḍa kāḷuvaḷḷiyaguttiyiṁ baḍagapaḍuvalā
gi panni¨rmmatta¨rbbeḻdaleyumātraiḷōkyakaṁttārapaṁḍitara kālaṁ kaḻci dhārāpū
¨rvvakaṁ sa¨rvvanamaśyaṁ māḍi traiḷōkyanakarēśvarakkaṁ biṭṭarībhūmi pannasa
ṭakkaṁ samabhāgavīdha¨rmmaṁ pratipāḷisidātaṁge sāyirakavileyakō
ḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnalkaṭṭisi kurukṣētravāraṇāsiya¨rghyatī¨rtthaprayōgeyaṁbīpu
ṇyakṣētraṁgaḷoḷ sāsi¨rvva¨rvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇa¨rgge dānaṁgeyda
phaḷamakku midanaḷidātaṁgākṣētradoḷākavileyanābrāhmaṇaruvaṁ
sāyira tapōdhanaruvaṁ sāyiraliṁgamuvanaḷada pātakamakkuṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahaśrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . smaraharavaṁśaruṁ nānā sallidalli siṣṭaruṁ .
mayamu tapōdhanaraṁ taruṇōnnatarāganirataraṁ dhā¨rmmikaraṁ
[Idu] kāḷāmukhasthānā ktaroḷuThe inscription is left incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 6.574 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
